source_meta.source_document: Continuum Acetabular System and Taperloc Complete Hip System

systems.system_notes: Primary total hip arthroplasty platform combining the Continuum porous metal acetabular system with the Taperloc Complete femoral stem.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe dedicated instrumentation for the Continuum acetabular workflow and Taperloc Complete femoral preparation.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe Taperloc Complete as the femoral stem family for the platform.
Official product materials describe Continuum as the porous metal acetabular shell platform.
Official product materials describe modular liner options for the Continuum acetabular system.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The official product pages establish the implant families but this pass does not expose a public SKU table.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure or IFU pass is needed for product-code level detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction captures tray and implant-family rows only.
